text:
This article is about a young girl from Xenotime. You may also be looking for Elicia Hughes, the daughter of Maes Hughes.

, named Alisa in the Trading Card Game, is a young girl who lives in Xenotime. She is the daughter of Lemack. Elisa is also fond of Belsio, who she refers to as "Uncle Belsio", however it's unknown if he is actually her uncle or if she uses it simply as a term of endearment, as Elisa's official description on the Hagaren website merely states that she likes Belsio and doesn't imply any relation between the two.
